arguments.argument: findTargetX=point_distance(oPlayer1.x,0,x,0) findTargetY=point_distance(0,oPlayer1.y,0,y) if findTargetX<drawRangeX and findTargetY<drawRangeY { if newSprite=0 draw_sprite_ext(sprite_index,image_index,x,y,image_xscale,image_yscale,image_angle,image_blend,image_alpha) else if newSprite=1 //Magical Quest draw_background_part(tileMagicalQuestA,0,32,64,16,x,y) else if newSprite=2 //Gate 4 Intro { draw_background_part(tileMM_A2,64,128,32,16,x,y) draw_background_part(tileMM_A2,128,128,32,16,x+32,y) } else if newSprite=3 //Farreaches draw_background_part(tileFarreachesA,0,176,32,16,x,y) else if newSprite=4 //Gate 6 - Castle of DOOM draw_background_part(tileCastleOfDoom,64,64,64,16,x,y) }
